projectDescription: A self-hosted, subscription-based AI business manager for adult content creators that automates fan engagement, multi-platform management, content scheduling, and analytics — with all data and inference running on private infrastructure.
keyFeatures: Multi-platform management for OnlyFans, Fansly, Instagram, TikTok from a single interface
Private AI inference via local Ollama models — zero cloud LLM dependency
Fan CRM with 71 engagement fields, per-fan memory injection, and AI-personalized replies
Advanced memory & retrieval stack: HyDE, RRF fusion, synaptic LIF propagation, Shannon entropy gating
3,205-node adult content taxonomy for automatic content classification
Steganographic watermarking for leak tracing at individual fan level
Agent-driven UI (Stage Architecture) where AI controls panel visibility via SSE events
83-tool unified MCP server across 6 namespaced plugin bundles
Automation rule engine for win-back, upsell, birthday, and re-engagement sequences
Nightly Hebbian memory consolidation with FP-Growth cross-user pattern mining
publicApiSurface: POST /api/genie/stream-chat — AI chat with SSE streaming and stage control events
POST /api/rbac-sync — Directus role → AnythingLLM workspace sync webhook
POST/GET /api/credentials — AES-256-GCM encrypted platform credential store
POST/GET /api/queue — BullMQ job enqueue and status polling
POST /api/captions/generate — AI caption generation with quota enforcement
POST /api/posts/schedule — scheduled post creation with tier quota enforcement
GET/POST /api/skills — agent skill discovery and activation via stimulus propagation
cms.directus MCP plugin — 55 tools for full Directus 11 CRUD API
ai.ollama MCP plugin — generate, chat, list-models tools
web.stagehand MCP plugin — 9 browser automation tools
media.process MCP plugin — validate, watermark, clip, thumbnail, job-status tools
taxonomy.core MCP plugin — search, tag-content, map-term, ingest-source, rebuild-graph tools
memory.recall MCP plugin — activate_skills, get_skill, find_skills, get_correlations tools
